name: Menu_Depreciaciones
wl_code:
IF sIdentifier="52" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 52, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 53, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 54, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 53, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 54, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="53" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 53, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="54" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 54, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
END
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 53, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento53 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 54, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nElemento54 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 52, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nElemento53=0 AND nElemento54=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nElemento53=1 AND nElemento54=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nElemento53=1 OR nElemento54=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
